name: Minerals Technologies Inc.
description: Minerals Technologies Inc. is a global, technology-driven specialty minerals company that develops, produces, and markets a broad range of mineral, mineral-based, and synthetic mineral products and related systems and services. Serving a diverse array of industries, including paper, foundry, steel, construction, environmental, energy, and consumer products, the company leverages its expertise in mineral science to provide performance-enhancing solutions. Headquartered in New York, Minerals Technologies operates globally, focusing on innovation and sustainable practices to deliver value to its customers while maintaining a strong commitment to safety, environmental stewardship, and operational excellence across its worldwide facilities.
